problem id: 0abfab8b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  11111011 -> 10110111
  01001110 -> 00111010
  00011110 -> 00010000
  11111110 -> 01100111
  00011100 -> 00110001
  00011000 -> 01110011
  10011001 -> 10100111
  01101100 -> 00001011
  00000100 -> 10111101
  10110010 -> 10000111

query: 10111100
predicted answer: 01100101
